title: acalypha dewevrei
intro: Acalypha dewevrei, also known as the African joint bush, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Acalypha dewevrei include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antimalarial agent. Herbal preparations of Acalypha dewevrei typically involve extracting its leaves and roots to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
